message:
fix: dep.go external ref removal, dead --type flag, and type validation (bd-jmzc)

Three fixes in dep.go:
- depRemoveCmd: add external ref handling so `external:` prefixed deps
  can be removed (mirrors depAddCmd pattern with auto-conversion fallback)
- depTreeCmd: remove dead --type flag that was registered but never read
  (TreeNode lacks type info; users should use `bd dep list --type` instead)
- depAddCmd: validate depType via IsValid() before storing, preventing
  empty or oversized garbage values in the DB

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/amber
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
